news.title: Multi-Agency Durable Solutions Initiative Launched for Sudan’s Displaced Communities
news.summary: UN agencies and partners launched a new initiative aimed at linking urgent support with longer-term recovery for displaced communities in Sudan.

analysis.regional_analysis: African exposure is driven by uneven state capacity, security fragmentation in selected corridors, commodity dependency, and infrastructure stress.
analysis.summary: Sudan shows very weak economic momentum with GDP growth at -14.0%. Inflation remains elevated at 138.8%. Unemployment stands at 7.5%. Overall signals for the short-term outlook are mixed.
